{{Infobox character
| name = Akura Pride
| aliases = Pride
| parents = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Monarch]]}}
| siblings = {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|, [[Akura Mercy]], [[Malice]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|, [[Fury]]}}
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[shadow madra]], [[Enforcer techniques]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|, [[Bloodline armor|bloodline armor]]}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Akura Underlord, [[Underlord]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|, son of a Monarch}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura clan|Akura family]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|, Lindon's team}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|, [[Wolf Division]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|servant}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|, [[Soulsmith]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Uncrowned (novel)|Uncrowned]]
}}

''See also: [[Akura Pride Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Akura]] Pride is a member of the [[Akura clan]], a powerful family known for their mastery of [[shadow madra]]. He is the son of the [[Monarch]] [[Akura Malice]] and the younger brother of the talented [[Akura Mercy]]. Despite being relatively short in stature, Pride possesses a fierce and confrontational personality, often characterized by a perpetual glare and an intense sense of rage or indignation. He is frequently described as being unpopular among his peers within the clan. In terms of combat and role, Pride has served as a leader for an [[Akura backup team]] during competitions. His abilities include the use of [[Enforcer techniques]] and [[shadow madra]], which he can manifest as black tattoos on his skin. He has demonstrated significant resilience, having survived intense combat and grueling training sessions. Pride's motivations are deeply tied to his family; he feels a strong sense of responsibility toward his sister and is driven by the honor of the [[Akura]] name. Later in his development, he accepts a path involving advancement beyond his world, motivated by his connection to [[Mercy]] and a sense of duty.}}

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy's brother]] is named Pride.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c13">''Underlord'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Pride will be informed of [[Mercy]]'s participation in the [[Uncrowned King]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20">''Underlord'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|An [[Akura]] family member and servant, the short and glaring [[Akura]] Pride is an [[Underlord]] who has not yet reached the rank of [[Archlord]]. His [[Goldsign]] consists of swirling black tattoos on his face and neck, and he utilizes [[shadow madra]] through a [[Path]] featuring four techniques used exclusively for [[Enforcer]] combat. During the tournament, he secured twenty-second place and eventually ran ahead to accompany [[Lindon]]. After weathering a tide of fire from Sophara, Pride was left bleeding and panting on the sand beside [[Lindon]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">18</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Pride has swirling tattoos on his neck and face that serve as his [[Goldsign]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3">''Uncrowned'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Pride has not yet advanced to [[Archlord]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Pride is a member of the [[Akura]] family.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Pride has a [[Path]] with four available techniques.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Pride is an [[Akura]] [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Pride]] is short and glaring.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c6">''Uncrowned'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Pride uses [[shadow madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7">''Uncrowned'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Pride uses exclusively [[Enforcer techniques]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]]'s room is connected to Pride's room.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Pride ranked twenty-second in the tournament.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12">''Uncrowned'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Pride is an entity that accompanies [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13">''Uncrowned'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Pride is a target for [[Lindon]]'s [[dragon]]'s breath.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Pride is a character who can attack with his fists.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Pride]] ran ahead.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Pride is a servant.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14">''Uncrowned'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Pride has black lines on his skin.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Pride weathered the tide of fire from Sophara.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Pride is a character who was panting and bleeding on the sand next to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura]] Pride, the son of a [[Monarch]] and an [[Underlord]] who directs traffic on the docks, shares a connecting room with [[Lindon]] and his sister, [[Akura Mercy]]. As a master of [[Enforcer techniques]] and a member of [[Lindon]]'s team, he works to finish up his acolytes while wearing [[bloodline armor]]. During a conflict, Pride emerges from the shadow of a building only to find himself surrounded by enemies and left in bad shape with a mangled left arm. Despite being caught in an argument with [[Mercy]] near the evacuation portal, he ultimately survives the battle.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">17</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Pride shares a connecting room with [[Lindon]] and [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3">''Wintersteel'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Pride is [[Mercy's brother]] and an [[Underlord]] who directs traffic on the dock.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Pride is a member of [[Lindon]]'s team.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12">''Wintersteel'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Pride is finishing up acolytes.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Pride stands outside [[Lindon]]'s script over a campfire.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Pride is [[Akura Pride]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Pride is a master of [[Enforcer techniques]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Pride possesses [[bloodline armor]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Pride is someone [[Malice]] would sacrifice for her family.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22">''Wintersteel'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Pride emerged from the shadow of a building.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24">''Wintersteel'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Pride is the son of a [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Pride is a person who will be isolated alongside [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Pride and [[Mercy]] were arguing near the evacuation portal.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Pride is the brother of [[Akura Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Pride was one of the people surrounded by enemies.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Pride was in bad shape with a mangled left arm.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Pride survived the battle.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Pride has purple eyes.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2">''Bloodline'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Pride's Book contains many [[Enforcer techniques]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Pride is a person who told [[Mercy]] she doesn't need to be around.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5">''Bloodline'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] fears seeing Pride badly hurt again.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] thinks about how Pride might feel seeing [[Mercy]]'s situation.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Akura]] Pride is an [[Underlord]] and a [[Soulsmith]] distinguished by purple eyes. This individual possesses a [[Divine Treasure]] in the form of a red-and-silver Book that is wrapped in chains. During an encounter with [[Lindon]], Pride allowed him to catch a glimpse of this Book. As the sibling of [[Malice]], Pride remains available to provide assistance if the situation requires it and was seen positioned at [[Mercy]]'s side.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">10</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Akura Pride]] is an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Akura Pride]] has purple eyes.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Pride is an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Pride is a [[Soulsmith]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Pride possesses a red-and-silver Book wrapped in chains.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Pride's Book is a [[Divine Treasure]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Pride gave [[Lindon]] a look at his book.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5">''Dreadgod'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Pride has a Book.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Pride is a sibling of [[Malice]] who could be called to assist if necessary.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Pride was at [[Mercy]]'s side.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23">''Dreadgod'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Associated with the name [[Akura]], [[Akura]] Pride was once the target of an assassination attempt involving [[Seishen Daji]]. When [[Lindon]] ascended, he brought Pride along, though the entity was eventually taken by his half-brother, [[Fury]], for training. A three-star [[Wolf]], two-star [[Ghost]], two-star [[Fox]], and one-star [[Titan]], Pride possesses physical parameters that exceed those of the average recruit. He does not engage in combat for amusement and has implied that specific devices within the [[Wolf Division]] require more than just free activation.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Gadrael]]'s build reminds [[Lindon]] of [[Akura Pride]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Pride was the target of an assassination attempt involving [[Seishen Daji]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c9">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Akura Pride]] was brought along by [[Lindon]] when he ascended.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Akura Pride]] was taken by his half-brother, [[Fury]], for training.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Akura Pride]]'s physical parameters are better than the average recruit.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Akura Pride]] is a three-star [[Wolf]], two-star [[Ghost]], two-star [[Fox]], and one-star [[Titan]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Pride does not fight for amusement.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Akura Pride]] is associated with the name [[Akura]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Pride implied that certain devices in the [[Wolf Division]] are not free to activate.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|"You have quite an attitude for a servant."<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“Yeah, well, Pride made it clear that he doesn’t really need me around.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|“I am also academically interested. As a Soulsmith.”<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
